title: 4D/3N The Best of Danang & Hoi-An Vietnam Experience
details: Highlights: Ba Na Hills, Golden Bridge, French Village, Linh Ung Pagoda, Ao Dai Cultural Show, VinWonders Nam Hoi An Theme Park, Hoi An Ancient Town (UNESCO), Japanese Covered Bridge, Marble Mountain, Son Tra Peninsula, and My Khe Beach. Enjoy Vietnam’s perfect mix of culture, nature, and world-class attractions.
flyer: assets/data/packages/asia/Holidays in Vietnam Da Nang - Hoi An 2026/Flyer_1764725770.png

itinerary.day_details: Arrival at Da Nang International Airport. Meet and greet with tour guide and transfer to hotel for check-in. Flight: MNL–DAD 5J5756 19:25–21:30.

Breakfast at hotel. Visit Ba Na Hills via cable car to Ba Na Mountain. Explore French Village, Linh Ung Pagoda, Golden Bridge, and Le Jardin d’Amour. Optional visit to Debay Wine Cellar (own expense). Buffet lunch at Ba Na Hills. Return to Danang for shopping at Han Market & Bamboo Shopping Center. Enjoy the Ao Dai Cultural Show.

itinerary.day_title: Day 3: Danang – VinWonders Nam Hoi An – Hoi An (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at hotel. Visit VinWonders Nam Hoi An Theme Park. Lunch included. Explore Hoi An Ancient Town (UNESCO), Japanese Covered Bridge, and Kuang Dong Assembly House. Participate in DIY lantern making and paper lantern releasing along the Thu Bon River.

Breakfast at hotel. Visit Marble Mountain and Non Nuoc Stone Village. City tour including Han Market, Dragon Bridge, Han River Bridge, Love Bridge, Son Tra Peninsula, Linh Ung Pagoda, and My Khe Beach. Transfer to airport for departure. Flight: DAD–MNL 5J5757 22:30–02:25 (+1).

inclusions: Buffet lunch at Ba Na Hills
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Private coach for airport and tour transfers
exclusions: Child With Bed (8 yrs & above): same as adult rate
extra_details: Remaining balance to be fully paid 45 days before travel date.
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
